name: Escape From Spider
author: Poki
description: Can you feel the tingle down your spine? You better start running and don't look back, since in Escape From Spider nowhere is safe! In this terrifying game, you need to complete a series of tasks in order to make your way to freedom. You can earn coins to either unlock some amazing skins, or buy power-ups to help you (or sabotage the other players in the lobby). Do have what it takes to escape from the Spider's web? How do I play Escape From Spider? Use your mouse to interact with UI buttons! Move: WASD or Arrow Keys Emotes: Enter Pause: Escape Who created Escape From Spider? Escape From Spider is created by emolingo games. Play their other games on Poki: Car Machines , Disaster Arena , Draw my Path Obby , Escape From School , Rainbow Obby and Sword Masters ! How can I play Escape From Spider for free? You can play Escape From Spider for free on Poki. Can I play Escape From Spider on mobile devices and desktop? Escape From Spider can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Escape From Spider with my friend? Yes! Escape From Spider is a multiplayer game so you can play online with your friends!
